name: Pineapple Upside Down Ginger Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Light Brown Sugar, firmly packed
1 can 8 oz Pineapple Slices, drained and patted dry on paper towels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Place 3 tablespoons butter in a 9" x 11-1/2" x 2-inch cake pan. Place in oven until melted.
3. Remove pan from oven, swirl butter to coat pan, and immediately sprinkle brown sugar evenly over bottom of pan.
4. Arrange pineapple slices in single layer over the brown sugar.
5. Beat together 4 tablespoons butter and sugar in a medium-size bowl with an electric mixer on high-speed until creamy.
6. Beat in egg, molasses, and milk until well blended.
7. Stir together flour, baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, and salt in a medium-sized bowl.
8. Beat into batter on low speed, mixing until incorporated.
9. Spoon evenly over the pineapple in the baking pan.
10. Bake for 60 minutes or until cake tester inserted near center comes out clean. Remove from oven and immediately turn out onto serving platter.
11. Garnish the center of each pineapple ring with a maraschino cherry half.
